title: DiverseFX
description: DiverseFX - a minecraft plugin, which is used to display cool Visuals with the help of Resource Packs!
body:
DiverseFX - a minecraft plugin, which is used to display cool Visuals with the help of Resource Packs!

## Features

- **Resource Pack Integration**: Works with custom resource packs.
- **Easy Commands**: Simple commands for triggering effects.
- **Seamless Nexo Integration**: Provides a easy Nexo setup.

## Installation

1. Download DiverseFX from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/diversefx/versions)
2. Place the JAR file in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Install the required resource pack
4. Restart your server
5. Configure effects in `plugins/DiverseFX/settings.yml`

## Resource Pack

DiverseFX requires a resource pack to display visual effects. Download the resource pack from the plugin's Modrinth page and configure your server to use it.

## Commands

- `/visual ...` - Command to display the visuals.
- `/diversefx reload` - Reload configuration (admin)

## Permissions

- `diversefx.visual` - Visual effect commands
- `diversefx.admin` - Admin commands

## Configuration

Edit `plugins/DiverseFX/settings.yml` to:
- Configure available effects
- Set default effect parameters
- Change commands(requires restart) and permissions

## Requirements

- Paper or Paper Fork server.
- Java 21 or later
- Resource pack (download from Modrinth)
